productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Decade Low Sleek Black Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the women who love the brighter colour palette and a slimmer footwear Fit, the Decade Low Sleek shoe from adidas' Sleek Series collection is a great addition to your fitness wardrobe.UpperLeather upper with a patent leather overlay on the forefoot and brand stripes on the sides of the midfootPerforations on the midfoot and toe region for breathable comfortLacing system for a snug, customised fitMildly padded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for comfort and optimum fitMildly padded footbed for all-day comfortHard back heel to lock the foot in placeMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves and a pivot point on the big toe mound for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
